recent_matches.title: Backend Developer
recent_matches.subject: Application for Backend Developer — Sudip Kumar Adak
recent_matches.draft_body:
Dear Hiring Team at Bjak ,

I'm writing to apply for the Backend Developer position. I'm Sudip Kumar Adak, an MCA student (MCA (in progress), Pimpri Chinchwad University; BCA, Techno India Institute of Technology) based in Pune, Maharashtra, India, with hands-on experience in Python, Django, SQL, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Java.

Most recently I built MindFlow — AI Mental Health Companion — an AI-powered mental health platform with real-time emotion detection via NLP, an empathetic chatbot, wellness tracking, and crisis-support resources, built on Django + ML. You can see it live here: https://mental-health-ai-xy7u.onrender.com. I've also worked on an e-commerce platform with cart, auth, and responsive UI (JS/HTML/CSS) and a Python data-analytics dashboard with dynamic charts and KPI reporting.

I'd welcome the chance to bring that same hands-on, full-stack + AI/ML background to Bjak . My portfolio, resume details, and other projects are here: https://thebright10.github.io/Portfolio_Sudip/ GitHub: https://github.com/Thebright10 | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sudip-kumar-adak-26b303245/

Thank you for your time and consideration — I'd love to talk further.

Best regards,
Sudip Kumar Adak
adaksudip956@gmail.com
